Write a thorough, practical explanation of database indexing for a backend developer or CS student who has used databases but doesn't fully understand why queries get slow or how indexes fix it. Include: (1) the problem without indexes — a full table scan: searching through millions of rows one by one — use the phone book analogy for why this is slow, (2) what an index actually is at a data structure level — B-tree index as the most common: how it's structured, how it enables O(log n) lookups, (3) how to create an index in SQL — CREATE INDEX syntax, composite indexes, covering indexes, (4) how to use EXPLAIN/EXPLAIN ANALYZE in PostgreSQL or MySQL to see if your query is using an index — walk through an example output, (5) the cost of indexes — every index slows down INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and uses disk space — the read vs write tradeoff, (6) when to add indexes and when not to: high-cardinality columns, frequently WHERE/JOIN/ORDER BY columns — never on low-cardinality columns (like boolean), (7) other index types briefly: unique indexes, partial indexes, full-text indexes, hash indexes — one sentence on each. Include a 'should I add an index here?' decision framework. Tone: technical but clear, with real SQL examples throughout.

Node.js aur Express ke saath ek production-ready REST API banane ka step-by-step Hindi tutorial likho un logon ke liye jinhe basic JavaScript aati hai. Niche diye topics cover karo: (1) Node.js kya hai — event loop, non-blocking I/O briefly; Express kyon use karte hain (minimal, fast, flexible), (2) project setup: npm init, Express install karna, basic server banana — app.listen() se Hello World, (3) REST API ke routes banana: GET (list aur single item), POST (create), PUT/PATCH (update), DELETE — ek simple 'Books' API example use karo poore tutorial mein, (4) request body parse karna: express.json() middleware, req.body, req.params, req.query ka fark, (5) MongoDB + Mongoose connect karna: Schema aur Model banana, CRUD operations async/await ke saath, (6) Error handling: global error handler middleware, proper HTTP status codes bhejo (400, 404, 500), try/catch se async errors, (7) Authentication: JWT-based login — register aur login routes, token generate karna, protect middleware se routes secure karna. Environment variables: dotenv use karna. Postman se test karna. Final project structure batao. Deployment: Railway ya Render.

Write a clear, practical introduction to software design patterns for an intermediate developer who has been coding for 1–2 years and wants to write more professional code. Include: (1) what design patterns are — not code you copy-paste but proven solutions to recurring design problems; history: Gang of Four book, (2) the three categories: Creational (how objects are created), Structural (how objects are composed), Behavioral (how objects communicate) — one-sentence overview of each, (3) deep dive into 5 most commonly used patterns with a real-world scenario, UML-like text diagram, and Python/JavaScript code example for each: Singleton (ensure one instance — database connection), Factory Method (create objects without specifying exact class — notification system), Observer (event-driven updates — stock price alerts), Strategy (swap algorithms at runtime — payment methods), Decorator (add behavior dynamically — logging middleware), (4) how to recognize when to apply a pattern vs over-engineering, (5) anti-patterns — what they are and three common ones to avoid: God Object, Spaghetti Code, Golden Hammer, (6) design patterns in popular frameworks — how React hooks use Observer, Express middleware uses Chain of Responsibility. Tone: practical, with emphasis on when to use, not just what they are.

input: web scraping Python se karna sikhao

input: how to use git properly for teamwork

input: Java mein OOP concepts interview ke liye

Write a comprehensive explanation of microservices architecture for a backend developer who has worked with monolithic applications and wants to understand what microservices are and when to use them. Write a thorough, practical guide to React Hooks for a developer who knows class-based React components and is transitioning to functional components, or a beginner learning React from scratch. Include: (1) why hooks were introduced — the problems with class components: verbose lifecycle methods, confusing 'this' binding, difficulty reusing stateful logic, (2) the two rules of hooks and why they exist — only call at the top level, only call from React functions, (3) useState in depth — the full mental model: state as a snapshot, why setState is asynchronous, functional updates (prevState), how to handle object and array state correctly without mutation, (4) useEffect in depth — the dependency array explained precisely: empty array vs no array vs specific dependencies, cleanup functions (return from useEffect), common mistakes (infinite loops, stale closures), (5) useContext — solving prop drilling: create context, provide it, consume it — a practical theme switcher example, (6) useRef — two use cases: accessing DOM elements directly, persisting mutable values across renders without causing re-renders, (7) custom hooks — extracting and reusing stateful logic: build a useFetch hook from scratch step by step. Include a common hooks mistakes section. Tone: deep, precise, and project-driven.

input: cybersecurity basics sikhne hain beginner ke liye
target: Cybersecurity mein interest rakhne wale beginners ke liye ek comprehensive Hindi starter guide banao. Yeh guide students aur professionals dono ke liye suitable ho jo is field mein career banana chahte hain ya apni online security better karna chahte hain. Niche diye topics cover karo: (1) cybersecurity kya hai — confidentiality, integrity, availability (CIA triad) ka concept simply, (2) common threats explained: phishing, malware types (virus, worm, ransomware, trojan), SQL injection, man-in-the-middle attacks — har ek kaise kaam karta hai real examples se, (3) networking basics jo cybersecurity ke liye zaroori hain: IP addressing, TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP vs HTTPS, ports aur protocols, (4) practical security skills: Linux command line basics (Kali Linux introduction), Wireshark se network traffic dekhna, basic vulnerability scanning with Nmap, (5) ethical hacking vs malicious hacking ka fark — legal boundaries, bug bounty programs kya hote hain, responsible disclosure, (6) cybersecurity career paths: penetration tester, SOC analyst, security engineer, CISO — kaunsi certifications kahan jaati hain (CEH, CompTIA Security+, OSCP), (7) free learning resources: TryHackMe, Hack The Box, PortSwigger Web Academy, OWASP Top 10. Tone responsible aur ethical rakho. Illegal activities encourage mat karo.

Write a comprehensive, actionable guide on optimizing web application performance for frontend developers who can build websites but find them loading slowly. Cover: (1) understanding Core Web Vitals — LCP (Largest Contentful Paint), FID/INP (Interaction to Next Paint), CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) — what each measures and target values for 'good' scores, (2) how to measure performance: Chrome DevTools Lighthouse audit, PageSpeed Insights, WebPageTest — how to read the results and prioritize fixes, (3) image optimization — the biggest win for most sites: choose right format (WebP > JPEG > PNG for photos), use responsive images (srcset), lazy loading with loading='lazy', compression tools (Squoosh, ImageOptim), (4) JavaScript optimization: code splitting and lazy loading chunks, tree shaking, defer and async script loading, avoiding render-blocking scripts, (5) CSS optimization: critical CSS inlining, removing unused CSS (PurgeCSS), avoiding expensive CSS properties (box-shadow, filter), (6) network optimizations: HTTP/2, CDN usage, caching headers (Cache-Control, ETag), compression (gzip/Brotli), resource hints (preload, prefetch, preconnect), (7) rendering performance: avoiding layout thrashing, will-change property, requestAnimationFrame for animations, virtual scrolling for long lists. Include a performance optimization checklist. Tone: technical, prioritized (biggest impact first), and practical.

Amazon Web Services (AWS) ko beginners ke liye Hindi mein explain karo jo cloud computing mein naye hain lekin developer ya IT professional hain. Niche diye topics include karo: (1) cloud computing kya hai — on-premise servers vs cloud ka comparison, IaaS, PaaS, SaaS briefly, AWS kyun market leader hai, (2) AWS Global Infrastructure: regions aur availability zones kya hain aur yeh important kyun hain (latency, redundancy), (3) Most important services for beginners: EC2 (virtual server — instance types, security groups, key pairs), S3 (object storage — buckets, objects, static website hosting), RDS (managed relational database — kyon apna DB manage karna zyada mushkil hai), Lambda (serverless functions — kab use karein, pricing model), IAM (Identity and Access Management — users, roles, policies — sabse zaroori service), (4) AWS Free Tier — kya free milta hai, kaise avoid karein unexpected charges, billing alerts set karna, (5) ek simple project: EC2 pe ek Node.js app deploy karna — step by step, (6) AWS CLI setup aur basic commands — programmatically services use karna, (7) AWS certification path: Cloud Practitioner se Solutions Architect — kya expect karein. Tone practical aur beginner-paced rakho.

Write a comprehensive, honest guide on preparing for and succeeding in technical coding interviews at product-based companies (including FAANG and Indian unicorns like Flipkart, Razorpay, Swiggy). Include: (1) understanding the coding interview format — phone screen, technical rounds (DSA), system design round (for senior roles), behavioral round — what each looks for, (2) DSA preparation strategy — topic priority list ordered by interview frequency: arrays, strings, hash maps, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, (3) the problem-solving framework to use during the interview: read → clarify → think aloud → brute force first → optimize → code → test with edge cases — practice this as a ritual, (4) how to think aloud effectively — interviewers are evaluating your process, not just your answer — practice narrating your thoughts with examples, (5) system design preparation for mid-to-senior roles: scalability concepts, load balancing, caching (Redis), database sharding, message queues — resources: Grokking System Design, (6) behavioral interview preparation: STAR method for 'tell me about a challenge,' 'disagreement with manager,' 'failure' — prepare 5 stories, (7) mock interview strategy: Pramp, Interviewing.io, LeetCode premium company-tagged problems, timing yourself strictly. Realistic timeline: 3–6 months for solid preparation. Tone: honest, structured, and motivating.

input: Flutter se mobile app banana shuru karna
target: Flutter se pehli mobile app banane wale beginners ke liye ek comprehensive Hindi guide banao. Yeh guide un logon ke liye hai jinhe koi bhi programming language ki basic knowledge ho. Write a thorough introduction to functional programming (FP) concepts for an intermediate developer who knows object-oriented programming but has never explored FP. Use JavaScript for examples. Include: (1) the core philosophy of functional programming — functions as first-class citizens, computation as transformation of data, avoiding shared mutable state — contrast with OOP's approach, (2) pure functions — definition: same inputs always produce same output, no side effects — why they are easier to test, compose, and reason about, with impure vs pure examples, (3) immutability — why mutating state causes bugs, how to work with immutable data structures in JavaScript using spread operator and Object.freeze(), (4) higher-order functions — functions that take or return functions: map, filter, reduce — detailed examples and how they replace imperative loops, (5) function composition and currying — combining small functions to build complex transformations, currying explained with a real form validation example, (6) avoiding side effects — where they are unavoidable (I/O, API calls), how FP handles them with a 'push side effects to the edges' strategy, (7) FP in practice: how React (pure components, hooks) and Redux (pure reducers, immutable state) use functional principles — connecting theory to tools developers already use. Tone: conceptual but grounded in practical examples.

input: Python decorators kaise kaam karte hain
target: Python decorators ko intermediate Python developers ke liye ek step-by-step Hindi tutorial mein deeply explain karo. Yeh ek topic hai jo bahut useful hai lekin beginners ko mysterious lagta hai. Niche diye topics cover karo: (1) decorators samajhne ke liye pehle yeh samjho: functions first-class citizens hain — functions ko variables mein store karna, functions ko arguments mein pass karna, functions se functions return karna — code examples, (2) closures kya hote hain — inner function outer function ke variables access kar sakti hai — decorator ka building block, (3) apna pehla decorator manually banana — bina @ syntax ke — step by step, phir @ syntax shortcut dikhao, (4) arguments wale functions pe decorator apply karna: *args aur **kwargs ka use, functools.wraps kyun zaroori hai (docstring aur name preserve karna), (5) real-world decorator examples: timing decorator (function execution time measure karna), logging decorator, authentication check decorator (Flask/Django mein jaise use hota hai), retry decorator, (6) decorators with arguments — ek decorator factory banana: @retry(times=3) jaisa — nested functions ka concept, (7) class-based decorators briefly, aur Python ke built-in decorators: @staticmethod, @classmethod, @property — kab kaunsa use karein. Practice exercises with solutions do.

input: how does garbage collection work in programming
target: Write a clear, detailed explanation of garbage collection for a developer who understands variables and memory allocation but has never thought deeply about how memory is managed automatically. Include: (1) the fundamental problem — why manual memory management in C/C++ leads to memory leaks and dangling pointers, and why higher-level languages automate this, (2) the heap vs the stack — what lives where, why the heap needs garbage collection while the stack is managed automatically via function call frames, (3) reference counting — the simplest GC approach: track how many references point to each object, free when count hits zero — Python's primary mechanism, with the circular reference problem as its critical flaw, (4) mark-and-sweep algorithm — tracing from roots, marking reachable objects, sweeping unreachable ones — walk through a small object graph example, (5) generational garbage collection — the key insight: most objects die young — Young/Old/Permanent generations in JVM, how promotion works, why this is more efficient, (6) garbage collection in specific languages: Java's G1/ZGC collectors, Python's combination of reference counting + cyclic GC, JavaScript's V8 Orinoco collector — brief overview of each, (7) practical implications for developers: when to care about GC, how to avoid common memory leak patterns in JavaScript and Python, how to profile memory usage. Tone: technically precise but accessible.

Draft an explanatory guide on Non-Compete and Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) for startup employees and founders. Audience: tech professionals and HR managers. Tone: balanced, legal-tech, and educational. Format: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) style. Constraints: ensure it addresses modern remote-work scenarios. Specific details to cover: (1) what makes a non-compete legally enforceable (reasonableness in time, geography, and scope), (2) the difference between protecting trade secrets and restricting fair employment, (3) state-specific bans on non-competes (e.g., California), and (4) what happens if an employee breaches the contract.

Property kharidte waqt dhyaan rakhne yogya kanooni baaton (Property Law aur Real Estate guidelines) par ek detailed checklist banao. Audience: first-time home buyers ya plot kharidne wale log. Tone: cautious, informative, aur highly structured. Format: sequential checklist jisme red flags highlight kiye gaye hon. Specific details cover karo: (1) Title Search aur Encumbrance Certificate (EC) ka mahatva, (2) RERA (Real Estate Regulation and Development Act) ke fayde aur RERA approved project check karne ka tarika, (3) Sale Deed vs Agreement to Sell ka legal farq, aur (4) agricultural land ko non-agricultural (NA) mein convert karne ka basic niyam.

Generate a comprehensive outline for a website Privacy Policy that complies with GDPR and CCPA regulations. Target audience: small business owners running e-commerce websites. Tone: formal, transparent, and legally compliant. Format: section-by-section breakdown with plain-English summaries for each legal clause. Specific details to include: (1) what personal data is collected (cookies, emails, payment info), (2) how the data is used and stored, (3) third-party data sharing (Google Analytics, payment processors), (4) user rights (right to access, right to be forgotten), and (5) contact information for data protection inquiries.

Bharat mein Vasiyat (Will) banane ke kanooni niyam aur tarike par ek clear aur detailed article likho. Audience: senior citizens aur unke parivaar wale jo estate planning karna chahte hain. Tone: respectful, serious, aur legally accurate. Format: step-by-step guide aur FAQs. Specific details: (1) ek valid Will ke essential elements (sound mind, clear intention), (2) do witnesses (gawah) ki mojoodgi aur unke signature ki ahmiyat, (3) registered Will vs unregistered Will ka kanooni wazan, (4) Will ko modify ya cancel (revoke) karne ka tarika, aur (5) executor (nushpadak) chunne ke niyam. Aakhir mein probate of Will ka chhota sa explanation do.

Create a comprehensive, 7-day Indian vegetarian meal plan for a newly diagnosed Type 2 Diabetic patient. Audience: an adult seeking practical, culturally relevant dietary advice. Tone: encouraging, medical-adjacent, and practical. Format: a daily schedule (Breakfast, Mid-morning, Lunch, Evening Snack, Dinner) with specific portion sizes and cooking methods. Constraints: focus on low Glycemic Index (GI) foods, high fiber, and lean protein. Exclude all refined sugars and white rice. Include a section explaining the importance of hydration, portion control, and consulting a certified nutritionist or doctor before starting the diet.

Ek aam viral fever (bukhar) ke lakshan (symptoms), gharelu nuskhe (home remedies), aur kab doctor ko dikhana chahiye (red flags), is par ek detailed health guide banao. Audience: parents aur aam log jo ghar par basic care karna chahte hain. Tone: informative, soothing, aur medically responsible. Format: bullet points aur clear headings. Details to cover: (1) temperature check karne ka sahi tarika aur paracetamol ka safe dosage, (2) hydration ki ahmiyat (ORS, nariyal pani, aur soups), (3) thande pani ki patti (cold compress) rakhne ka sahi tarika, aur (4) warning signs jaise lagatar tej bukhar (103°F+), saans lene mein takleef, ya chakkkar aana, jisme turant doctor ke paas jana zaroori hai.

Develop a detailed, safe exercise routine for an office worker suffering from mild, chronic lower back pain due to prolonged sitting. Target audience: sedentary adults with no prior severe spinal injuries. Tone: cautious, instructional, and motivating. Formatting: step-by-step instructions for each exercise, including the number of repetitions, sets, and frequency per week. Specific details: focus on core strengthening and flexibility. Include the Cat-Cow stretch, Bird-Dog, Pelvic Tilts, and Knee-to-Chest stretches. Emphasize the importance of maintaining proper posture at the desk and include a strict disclaimer to stop any exercise that causes sharp pain and to consult a physiotherapist.

Ek sustainable aur healthy vajan kam karne (weight loss) ka plan taiyar karo, jisme fad diets ya crash diets ka istemal na ho. Audience: wo log jinka routine busy hai aur jo safely apna weight manage karna chahte hain. Tone: motivational, realistic, aur scientifically accurate. Format: 5 main principles aur actionable tips. Specific details: (1) Caloric deficit ka matlab simple bhasha mein samjhao bina starvation ke, (2) protein aur fiber ki ahmiyat (jaise paneer, dal, sabziyan), (3) NEAT (Non-Exercise Activity Thermogenesis) yani din bhar thoda active rehne ka fayda (jaise seedhi chadhna), (4) 7-8 ghante ki achi neend aur stress management ka weight loss se connection. Aakhir mein patience rakhne aur consistent rehne ki advice do.

Provide an in-depth, easy-to-understand explanation of Hypertension (High Blood Pressure), often called the 'silent killer.' Audience: middle-aged adults who have recently had a high reading. Tone: serious but not alarmist, highly educational, and supportive. Format: structured paragraphs with key takeaways highlighted. Specific details to include: (1) what the two numbers (systolic and diastolic) actually mean and what ranges are considered normal vs. high, (2) the primary causes and risk factors (genetics, high sodium intake, stress, obesity), (3) the long-term dangers if left untreated (stroke, heart attack, kidney damage), and (4) lifestyle modifications (DASH diet, reducing alcohol, regular cardio) that can help manage it.

Mental Health (mansik swasthya) ki ahmiyat par ek jagrukta (awareness) article likho, jisme anxiety aur depression ke aam lakshan samjhaye gaye hon. Audience: Indian society jahan mental health par baat karna abhi bhi ek taboo (kalank) mana jata hai. Tone: empathetic, destigmatizing, aur professional. Format: myth vs fact format ka istemal karo aur aasan bhasha mein samjhao. Details to cover: (1) sad feel hone aur clinical depression ke beech ka farq, (2) anxiety attacks kya hote hain aur unme kaisa feel hota hai, (3) therapy aur counseling ke baare mein faili galatfehmiyon ko dur karna (jaise 'therapy sirf pagal logo ke liye hai'), aur (4) agar koi dost ya parivar ka sadasya pareshan hai toh uski madad kaise karein (active listening bina judge kiye).

Write a clear, step-by-step guide on how to perform Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation (Hands-Only CPR) on an adult in an emergency situation. Audience: the general public with no formal medical training. Tone: urgent, precise, and empowering. Format: sequential, numbered steps that are easy to remember under stress. Specific details must include: (1) checking the scene for safety and assessing the person's responsiveness, (2) immediately calling emergency services (e.g., 911 or local equivalent) before starting, (3) the correct hand placement on the center of the chest, (4) the exact rate (100-120 compressions per minute, to the beat of 'Stayin' Alive') and depth (at least 2 inches), and (5) emphasizing that doing something is better than doing nothing.

High Cholesterol (khas taur par LDL ya 'bad' cholesterol) ko naturally aur dawaiyon ke bina kam karne ke liye ek lifestyle aur diet modification guide banao. Audience: 40+ saal ke vyakti jinki recent lipid profile report aayi hai. Tone: informative, practical, aur health-focused. Format: 'Kya Khayein' aur 'Kya Chodein' ki clear lists aur lifestyle changes. Specific details: (1) LDL (bad) aur HDL (good) cholesterol ka difference samjhao, (2) trans fats aur saturated fats (jaise processed food, deep-fried snacks) se bachne ke reasons, (3) soluble fiber (jaise oats, isabgol, beans) aur omega-3 (jaise akhrot, flaxseeds) ke fayde, aur (4) rozana 30 minute brisk walk ya aerobic exercise ka cholesterol par asar. Doctor se lagatar checkup ki ahmiyat par zor do.

Detail the scientifically proven health benefits of a daily mindfulness meditation practice. Target audience: busy professionals experiencing high levels of stress and burnout. Tone: scientific, reassuring, and practical. Format: categorize the benefits into physical, mental, and emotional health, using bullet points for readability. Specific details to cover: (1) the reduction of cortisol (the stress hormone) and its effect on the immune system, (2) improvements in focus, neuroplasticity, and gray matter density in the brain, (3) emotional regulation and decreased symptoms of anxiety, and (4) a simple 5-minute breathing exercise (like box breathing) to help beginners get started immediately without feeling overwhelmed.

Pregnancy (Garbhavastha) ke pehle trimester (shuruaati 3 mahine) ke liye ek detailed nutrition aur diet guide taiyar karo. Audience: pehli baar maa banne wali mahilayein (first-time pregnant women). Tone: caring, informative, aur medically safe. Format: jaruri nutrients ki list aur daily routine ke hisaab se meal ideas. Specific details: (1) Folic acid, iron, aur calcium ki ahmiyat aur wo kin foods se milte hain (jaise hari sabziyan, dairy products, aur daalein), (2) morning sickness (ulti ya matli) ko manage karne ke liye chhote aur frequent meals khane ki advice (jaise adrak ki chai ya dry toast), (3) kin cheezon se bilkul bachna chahiye (kacha papita, kacha doodh, alcohol, aur zyada caffeine), aur (4) doctor dwara di gayi prenatal vitamins ko regular lene ka reminder.

Draft a professional customer complaint response email for an e-commerce company. Address: (1) acknowledgment of the complaint within first sentence, (2) sincere apology for the inconvenience, (3) explanation of what went wrong (product delivery delay), (4) concrete solution offered (full refund or replacement), (5) timeline for resolution (3-5 business days), (6) compensation gesture (10% discount coupon for next purchase), (7) direct contact details for escalation. Tone: empathetic yet professional. Format: standard business email with greeting, body paragraphs, and signature block.

input: grahak seva ke liye script chahiye
target: भारतीय टेलीकॉम कंपनी के लिए एक विस्तृत ग्राहक सेवा कॉल स्क्रिप्ट तैयार करें। शामिल करें: (1) शुरुआती अभिवादन और कंपनी का नाम, (2) ग्राहक की पहचान की पुष्टि (नाम, खाता संख्या), (3) समस्या को सुनने और स्वीकार करने के वाक्य, (4) 5 सामान्य समस्याओं के समाधान (नेटवर्क इश्यू, बिलिंग समस्या, रिचार्ज विफलता, प्लान अपग्रेड, शिकायत दर्ज), (5) यदि समस्या तुरंत हल न हो तो एस्केलेशन प्रक्रिया, (6) कॉल समापन और फॉलो-अप प्रक्रिया। भाषा: हिंदी और अंग्रेजी दोनों में विकल्प, स्वर: विनम्र और सहायक।

Create a comprehensive guide for customer service representatives on handling angry customers in Indian retail banking sector. Cover: (1) five active listening techniques (paraphrasing, acknowledging emotions, not interrupting), (2) de-escalation phrases to use ('I understand your frustration', 'Let me help resolve this immediately'), (3) phrases to absolutely avoid (never say 'calm down' or 'it's not our fault'), (4) the LEAPS framework (Listen, Empathize, Apologize, Problem-solve, Summarize), (5) when and how to escalate to a supervisor, (6) three breathing techniques for the representative to stay calm, (7) documentation best practices. Include 3 real-scenario examples with dialogue. Target audience: new customer service employees. Format: training manual section with bullet points and examples.

एक भारतीय ई-कॉमर्स कंपनी के लिए विस्तृत रिफंड पॉलिसी दस्तावेज़ तैयार करें। स्पष्ट करें: (1) रिफंड के लिए पात्र उत्पाद श्रेणियां (इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स, कपड़े, किताबें), (2) रिटर्न विंडो (डिलीवरी से 7-30 दिन, श्रेणी के अनुसार), (3) रिफंड प्रक्रिया के चरण: ऑनलाइन रिक्वेस्ट, पिकअप शेड्यूल, क्वालिटी चेक, अप्रूवल, (4) रिफंड का तरीका (मूल भुगतान विधि, वॉलेट, बैंक ट्रांसफर), (5) प्रोसेसिंग समय (5-7 कार्य दिवस), (6) गैर-रिफंडेबल आइटम्स (अंडरगारमेंट्स, खुले सॉफ्टवेयर), (7) आंशिक रिफंड की स्थितियां, (8) ग्राहक सहायता संपर्क। फॉर्मेट: FAQ शैली में प्रश्न-उत्तर, सरल भाषा।

Design a detailed complaint handling process flowchart and procedure document for a mid-sized Indian manufacturing company's customer service department. Include: (1) complaint registration channels (phone, email, website form, social media), (2) ticket categorization system (priority levels: critical/high/medium/low based on impact and urgency), (3) initial response timeline (acknowledge within 2 hours for critical, 24 hours for others), (4) investigation process with responsible departments, (5) resolution timeline targets (24 hours to 15 days based on complexity), (6) escalation matrix (Level 1: CSR, Level 2: Team Leader, Level 3: Manager, Level 4: Head of Customer Service), (7) customer communication touchpoints at each stage, (8) closure and feedback collection process, (9) complaint analytics and reporting metrics. Target audience: Customer service team and management. Format: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) with flowchart.

एक भारतीय ऑनलाइन फूड डिलीवरी ऐप के लिए चैटबॉट के 25 सामान्य प्रश्न-उत्तर बनाएं। शामिल करें: (1) ऑर्डर ट्रैकिंग ('मेरा ऑर्डर कहां है?'), (2) रिफंड और कैंसलेशन ('ऑर्डर कैंसल कैसे करें?'), (3) प्रोमो कोड समस्या ('कूपन काम नहीं कर रहा'), (4) डिलीवरी समय ('कितनी देर में आएगा?'), (5) भुगतान विफलता ('पेमेंट कट गया लेकिन ऑर्डर नहीं हुआ'), (6) खाता से संबंधित ('पासवर्ड भूल गया'), (7) रेस्तरां से संबंधित प्रश्न ('मेन्यू अपडेट'), (8) ऐप की तकनीकी समस्या। प्रत्येक उत्तर में: तुरंत समाधान, वैकल्पिक कदम यदि समाधान काम न करे, और मानव एजेंट से जुड़ने का विकल्प। स्वर: मित्रवत और सहायक, 2-4 वाक्यों में उत्तर, इमोजी का उचित प्रयोग।

Create a comprehensive customer feedback form for an Indian telecom service provider's post-call survey. Design 15 questions covering: (1) call handling efficiency (rating scale 1-5 for wait time, agent responsiveness), (2) issue resolution (was problem solved: yes/partially/no), (3) agent behavior (politeness, patience, communication clarity), (4) overall satisfaction with service experience, (5) Net Promoter Score question ('How likely are you to recommend us?'), (6) specific service aspects (network quality, billing clarity, value for money), (7) open-ended question for suggestions/complaints, (8) demographic questions (optional: age group, service plan). Include: clear instructions, mix of multiple choice, rating scales, and text boxes. Specify: mobile-friendly design, completion time under 3 minutes, option to skip questions. Add privacy notice about data usage.

एक भारतीय होटल चेन के लिए औपचारिक क्षमायाचना पत्र का प्रारूप तैयार करें जो एक अतिथि को भेजना है जिसे खराब सेवा का अनुभव हुआ। पत्र में शामिल करें: (1) विशिष्ट घटना का उल्लेख (कमरे की सफाई में कमी, देर से रूम सर्विस), (2) गहरी और ईमानदार माफी (जिम्मेदारी स्वीकार करते हुए), (3) क्या गलत हुआ इसकी संक्षिप्त व्याख्या (बिना बहाने बनाए), (4) सुधारात्मक कार्रवाई जो ली गई (स्टाफ को प्रशिक्षण, प्रक्रिया में बदलाव), (5) मुआवजा प्रस्ताव (एक रात का मुफ्त प्रवास, या 50% छूट अगली बुकिंग पर), (6) भविष्य में बेहतर सेवा का आश्वासन, (7) सीधा संपर्क (प्रबंधक का नाम, फोन, ईमेल)। स्वर: अत्यधिक विनम्र और व्यावसायिक। फॉर्मेट: औपचारिक व्यावसायिक पत्र (हेड, बॉडी, हस्ताक्षर)।

Develop a comprehensive 2-day training program curriculum for new customer support executives at an Indian fintech startup. Day 1 should cover: (1) company products and services overview (payment gateway, UPI, loans, insurance), (2) customer service philosophy and company values, (3) communication skills workshop (active listening, tone modulation, clarity), (4) tool training (CRM software, ticketing system, knowledge base), (5) common scenarios role-play. Day 2 should include: (1) handling difficult customers (de-escalation techniques), (2) complaint resolution framework, (3) RBI guidelines relevant to customer grievances, (4) data privacy and security protocols, (5) escalation procedures, (6) performance metrics explanation (AHT, FCR, CSAT), (7) mock call assessment. Include: training materials needed, trainer qualifications, assessment criteria, post-training support plan. Format: Detailed agenda with time allocation, learning objectives for each session, and interactive activity descriptions.

input: social media par response kaise de
target: भारतीय फैशन रिटेल ब्रांड के लिए सोशल मीडिया कस्टमर सर्विस गाइडलाइन दस्तावेज़ बनाएं। शामिल करें: (1) प्रतिक्रिया समय लक्ष्य (सकारात्मक टिप्पणी: 2 घंटे, नकारात्मक/शिकायत: 30 मिनट), (2) विभिन्न प्लेटफॉर्म के लिए टोन (Instagram: casual और friendly, Twitter: quick और professional, Facebook: detailed और helpful), (3) सार्वजनिक बनाम निजी प्रतिक्रिया कब दें (सार्वजनिक: सामान्य प्रशंसा/प्रश्न, DM में: व्यक्तिगत जानकारी, ऑर्डर विवरण), (4) 10 टेम्पलेट प्रतिक्रियाएं (स्टॉक की उपलब्धता, साइज़ की जानकारी, रिटर्न पॉलिसी, ऑर्डर ट्रैकिंग, शिकायत स्वीकृति), (5) नकारात्मक समीक्षा का जवाब देने की रणनीति (कभी भी बहस न करें, ऑफलाइन ले जाने का प्रयास करें), (6) किन स्थितियों में जवाब न दें (ट्रोल्स, अपमानजनक भाषा), (7) सोशल मीडिया क्राइसिस एस्केलेशन। ब्रांड वॉइस: युवा, ट्रेंडी, लेकिन सम्मानजनक।

Compose a proactive customer notification email from an Indian logistics company informing customers about delayed package delivery due to weather conditions. Structure: (1) Clear subject line mentioning delay, (2) Opening: immediate acknowledgment of delay with tracking number reference, (3) Reason explanation: specific weather event (monsoon flooding in Maharashtra) affecting operations, (4) New expected delivery date with confidence level, (5) What the company is doing to expedite (alternative routes, extra workforce), (6) Customer options (wait for delivery, reschedule, pickup from hub, or cancel for full refund), (7) Compensation offered (₹100 delivery fee waiver or discount voucher), (8) Direct support contact (phone number with extended hours, email, chat link), (9) Sincere apology emphasizing customer inconvenience. Tone: apologetic yet transparent and helpful. Include: professional email signature with full contact details. Word count: 200-250 words.

एक भारतीय डिजिटल बैंकिंग ऐप के लिए व्यापक FAQ पेज तैयार करें जिसमें 50 प्रश्न-उत्तर हों। श्रेणियां: (1) खाता खोलना (KYC आवश्यकताएं, दस्तावेज़, प्रक्रिया समय, पात्रता), (2) ऐप उपयोग (लॉगिन समस्या, पासवर्ड रीसेट, बायोमेट्रिक सेटअप), (3) लेनदेन (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS अंतर, लिमिट, शुल्क, समय), (4) डेबिट/क्रेडिट कार्ड (आवेदन, पिन जनरेशन, ब्लॉक/अनब्लॉक, खोया कार्ड), (5) सुरक्षा (फ्रॉड से बचाव, OTP साझा न करें, संदिग्ध गतिविधि रिपोर्ट), (6) शुल्क और चार्जेज (खाता रखरखाव, एटीएम शुल्क, चेकबुक), (7) विवाद और शिकायतें (गलत लेनदेन, रिफंड प्रक्रिया, ऑम्बड्समैन)। प्रत्येक उत्तर: सरल भाषा में 3-5 वाक्य, आवश्यकतानुसार स्क्रीनशॉट या लिंक का सुझाव। सर्चेबल फॉर्मेट में व्यवस्थित करें।

Develop a comprehensive customer retention strategy document for an Indian DTH (Direct-to-Home) television service provider facing high churn rates. Include: (1) Customer churn analysis framework (identify at-risk customers through usage patterns, payment delays, support call frequency), (2) Segmentation strategy (classify customers: high-value loyal, occasional viewers, price-sensitive, dissatisfied), (3) Proactive retention tactics for each segment: loyalty rewards program (points for tenure, referrals), personalized content recommendations, exclusive channel packages, (4) Win-back campaigns for lapsed customers (special discount offers, highlight new features, simplified reactivation), (5) Customer feedback loops (quarterly satisfaction surveys, exit interviews for cancellations), (6) Service improvement initiatives (faster complaint resolution, better technical support, improved signal quality), (7) Loyalty program structure (tiered benefits: silver/gold/platinum based on tenure), (8) Success metrics to track (churn rate reduction target, CLV increase, retention cost per customer), (9) Implementation timeline (6-month rollout plan). Target audience: Senior management and marketing team. Format: Strategic document with data points, action items, and budget estimates.

भारतीय बीमा कंपनी के लिए आउटबाउंड कॉल स्क्रिप्ट तैयार करें जो पॉलिसी रिन्यूअल रिमाइंडर के लिए है। स्क्रिप्ट में शामिल करें: (1) परिचय: एजेंट का नाम, कंपनी का नाम, कॉल का उद्देश्य स्पष्ट करना, (2) ग्राहक सत्यापन: नाम, पॉलिसी नंबर, जन्म तिथि से पुष्टि, (3) मुख्य संदेश: पॉलिसी समाप्ति तिथि (15 दिन शेष), कवरेज राशि का उल्लेख, (4) रिन्यूअल के लाभ (निरंतर कवरेज, नो-क्लेम बोनस बनाए रखना, प्रीमियम वृद्धि से बचना), (5) भुगतान विकल्प (ऑनलाइन, मोबाइल ऐप, बैंक ट्रांसफर, चेक), (6) सामान्य आपत्तियों के उत्तर ('प्रीमियम ज्यादा है' - लाभ और जोखिम समझाएं, 'बाद में करेंगे' - अंतिम तिथि याद दिलाएं), (7) अगर तुरंत निर्णय नहीं तो फॉलो-अप शेड्यूल करें, (8) कॉल समापन: धन्यवाद, हेल्पलाइन नंबर साझा करें। विकल्प: यदि ग्राहक रुचि न दिखाए तो विनम्रता से कॉल समाप्त करें। औसत कॉल समय: 3-5 मिनट।

Draft a detailed return and exchange policy document for an Indian electronics retail chain (both online and offline stores). Specify: (1) Eligible products (smartphones, laptops, TVs, accessories) with specific conditions for each category, (2) Return window: 7 days for smartphones with box opening allowed, 15 days for laptops if unopened, 30 days for accessories, (3) Exchange window: 10 days for defective products with same-model replacement or upgrade option, (4) Conditions for returns: original packaging required, all accessories intact, bill/invoice mandatory, product in working condition with no physical damage, (5) Non-returnable items: earphones, intimate gadgets, software/games if seal broken, customized products, (6) Process steps: online: request via app/website → approval → courier pickup → quality check → refund/exchange; offline: visit store with product and bill → inspection → immediate exchange or refund initiation, (7) Refund method and timeline: original payment mode - 7-10 business days for bank transfer, immediate for wallet, (8) Exchange shipping: free for defective products, customer pays for preference changes, (9) Warranty vs. return policy clarification, (10) Customer support contacts for queries. Format: User-friendly with clear section headers, examples, and visual icons.

ग्राहक सेवा प्रतिनिधियों के लिए फ़ोन पर प्रभावी संचार के लिए विस्तृत गाइड बनाएं (भारतीय कस्टमर सपोर्ट सेंटर के लिए)। शामिल करें: (1) कॉल शुरुआत - उत्साहपूर्ण अभिवादन ('गुड मॉर्निंग, आपका स्वागत है'), कंपनी नाम, अपना परिचय, कैसे मदद कर सकते हैं, (2) आवाज़ का स्वर - मध्यम गति, स्पष्ट उच्चारण, मुस्कुराते हुए बोलें (स्वर में झलकता है), उत्साह बनाए रखें, (3) सक्रिय सुनना - बीच में न टोकें, 'हम्म', 'ठीक है' से पुष्टि दें, ग्राहक की बात दोहराएं, (4) स्पष्टता के लिए प्रश्न पूछें - खुले प्रश्न ('आपको क्या समस्या हो रही है?'), बंद प्रश्न ('क्या आपने ऐप अपडेट किया?'), (5) तकनीकी शब्दों से बचें या सरल भाषा में समझाएं, (6) धैर्य रखें - यदि ग्राहक तुरंत न समझें तो दोबारा समझाएं, (7) पॉजिटिव लैंग्वेज - 'मैं नहीं कर सकता' की जगह 'मैं यह कर सकता हूं', (8) कॉल समापन - समाधान की पुनः पुष्टि, 'और कुछ?' पूछें, धन्यवाद दें। हर सेक्शन के लिए: करें/न करें की सूची और उदाहरण वाक्य। भाषा विकल्प: हिंदी, अंग्रेजी, हिंग्लिश में आरामदायक रहें।

Design a comprehensive customer satisfaction survey for an Indian car service center (authorized dealership). Create 20 questions covering: (1) Appointment booking experience (ease of scheduling, wait time for slot, reminder received), (2) Service advisor interaction (greeting, explanation of service required, cost transparency), (3) Service quality (work completed as promised, vehicle cleanliness after service, no new issues), (4) Facility assessment (waiting area comfort, cleanliness, amenities like WiFi/refreshments), (5) Pricing perception (value for money, competitive rates, no hidden charges), (6) Time efficiency (service completed within promised time, delays communicated), (7) Staff behavior (politeness, professionalism, technical knowledge), (8) Overall satisfaction rating (1-10 scale), (9) Net Promoter Score ('Would you recommend our service center?'), (10) Open feedback section for suggestions or complaints. Use mix of: 5-point Likert scales (strongly disagree to strongly agree), rating scales (1-5 stars), yes/no questions, multiple choice, and one open-ended question. Keep survey under 5 minutes. Specify: to be sent via SMS/email within 24 hours of service completion, option to win service discount voucher for completion. Include demographic questions (vehicle model, service type, customer since when).

एक भारतीय उपभोक्ता के लिए औपचारिक शिकायत पत्र का मानक प्रारूप बनाएं जो किसी कंपनी/सेवा प्रदाता को लिखना हो। संरचना: (1) शीर्षक - प्रेषक का पूरा नाम, पता, संपर्क नंबर, ईमेल (बाएं तरफ ऊपर), (2) तारीख, (3) प्राप्तकर्ता विवरण - पद (ग्राहक सेवा प्रबंधक), कंपनी का नाम, पता, (4) विषय पंक्ति - 'शिकायत पत्र: [समस्या का संक्षिप्त विवरण]', (5) अभिवादन ('महोदय/महोदया'), (6) मुख्य भाग - पैरा 1: स्वयं की पहचान (ग्राहक संख्या, खरीद तिथि), पैरा 2: समस्या का विस्तृत विवरण (क्या, कब, कहां), पैरा 3: पहले किए गए प्रयास (यदि कोई), पैरा 4: अपेक्षित समाधान (रिफंड/रिप्लेसमेंट/मुआवजा), पैरा 5: समय सीमा (7-10 दिन में जवाब की अपेक्षा), (7) संलग्नक - बिल, फोटो, पूर्व पत्राचार की प्रतियां, (8) समापन ('आपके सहयोग की आशा में'), (9) हस्ताक्षर और नाम। स्वर: दृढ़ लेकिन विनम्र, तथ्यात्मक, भावनात्मक भाषा से बचें। उपभोक्ता अधिकारों का संक्षिप्त उल्लेख जोड़ें यदि आवश्यक हो।

Create a detailed escalation matrix and procedure guide for customer service teams in an Indian airline company. Define: (1) Four escalation levels with clear hierarchy: Level 1 - Customer Service Representative (CSR) handles routine queries and complaints within authority limits, Level 2 - Team Leader/Supervisor (for issues unresolved after 24 hours or involving service failures), Level 3 - Customer Service Manager (for compensation above ₹10,000, legal threats, social media crises), Level 4 - Head of Customer Experience (for major incidents affecting multiple passengers, regulatory complaints to DGCA, media inquiries), (2) Escalation triggers: specify exact conditions when to escalate (angry customer after 10 minutes, compensation request above CSR authority, safety concerns, discrimination allegations, VIP passengers, repeated complaints), (3) Escalation process: CSR documents case completely in CRM, notifies supervisor via system and phone/email, provides case summary with urgency level, obtains escalation approval number, (4) Response time commitments at each level: L1: 24 hours, L2: 48 hours, L3: 72 hours, L4: immediate for crises, (5) Communication protocol: keep customer informed about escalation status, provide direct contact of escalated personnel, (6) De-escalation authority: what each level can offer (L1: ₹2000 voucher, L2: ₹5000 refund, L3: full ticket refund + compensation), (7) Documentation requirements at each stage, (8) Training for CSRs on when NOT to escalate. Include flowchart and real scenario examples.

भारतीय ई-कॉमर्स कंपनी के लिए WhatsApp Business के माध्यम से ग्राहक सेवा के लिए 15 मैसेज टेम्पलेट बनाएं। श्रेणियां: (1) ऑर्डर पुष्टिकरण - 'नमस्ते [नाम], आपका ऑर्डर #[नंबर] कन्फर्म हो गया है। राशि: ₹[amount]. डिलीवरी: [तिथि]. ट्रैक करें: [लिंक]', (2) शिपमेंट अपडेट - 'आपका पैकेज [शहर] से रवाना हो गया। अनुमानित डिलीवरी: [तिथि]. ट्रैकिंग: [लिंक]', (3) डिलीवरी एजेंट सूचना - 'डिलीवरी एजेंट [नाम] आपके पते पर 30 मिनट में पहुंचेगा। फोन: [नंबर]', (4) डिलीवरी हो गई - 'आपका ऑर्डर डिलीवर हो गया। अनुभव कैसा रहा? रेटिंग दें: [लिंक]', (5) रिफंड शुरू - 'आपका रिफंड ₹[राशि] प्रोसेस हो गया। 5-7 दिन में खाते में आएगा', (6) समस्या स्वीकृति - 'हमें आपकी शिकायत मिली। टिकट #[नंबर]. 24 घंटे में समाधान करेंगे', (7) ऑफर/प्रमोशन - '[त्योहार] विशेष: [छूट]% की छूट। कोड: [PROMO]. अभी खरीदें: [लिंक]'. प्रत्येक टेम्पलेट: 160 अक्षरों के भीतर, इमोजी का सीमित उपयोग, कॉल-टू-एक्शन बटन का सुझाव, ऑप्ट-आउट विकल्प।

Compile a comprehensive guide on essential customer service metrics and KPIs for an Indian SaaS company's support team. Cover 20 key metrics organized by category: (1) Efficiency Metrics: Average Handle Time (AHT) - target: under 6 minutes for calls, definition and calculation method; First Response Time (FRT) - target: under 1 hour for emails, under 2 minutes for chat; Ticket Resolution Time - categorize by complexity (simple: same day, moderate: 2-3 days, complex: 5-7 days), (2) Quality Metrics: First Contact Resolution (FCR) rate - target: above 70%, how to measure, Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT) - survey design with 1-5 scale, target: above 4.2, Net Promoter Score (NPS) - calculation method, target: above 50, Quality Assurance Score - call monitoring rubric with scoring, (3) Volume Metrics: Ticket Volume - daily, weekly trends, Backlog Count - aging analysis, Channel Distribution (email, chat, phone, social media), (4) Team Metrics: Agent Utilization Rate, Absenteeism, Training Hours, Employee Satisfaction, (5) Business Impact: Customer Churn Rate, Cost Per Contact, Customer Lifetime Value influenced by service. For each metric: clear definition, calculation formula, industry benchmark for India, recommended target, tracking frequency (daily/weekly/monthly), dashboard visualization suggestion. Explain how to build a balanced scorecard combining these metrics. Target audience: Customer Service Managers.

एक भारतीय हेल्थकेयर स्टार्टअप (ऑनलाइन डॉक्टर कंसल्टेशन ऐप) के लिए मासिक कस्टमर न्यूज़लेटर का फॉर्मेट और कंटेंट प्लान तैयार करें। संरचना: (1) हेडर - कंपनी लोगो, महीने का नाम, आकर्षक टैगलाइन, (2) संपादक का संदेश (100 शब्द) - नए फीचर्स, मील्सटोन, उपयोगकर्ताओं का धन्यवाद, (3) हाइलाइट सेक्शन - 3 मुख्य अपडेट: नई विशेषज्ञता (जैसे मानसिक स्वास्थ्य), नए डॉक्टर जुड़े (संख्या और विशेषज्ञता), ऐप अपडेट (नई सुविधाएं), (4) स्वास्थ्य टिप्स - मौसमी बीमारियों से बचाव (मानसून में डेंगू, सर्दी में सर्दी-जुकाम), 5-6 आसान टिप्स, (5) सफलता की कहानी - एक संतुष्ट उपयोगकर्ता का अनुभव (200 शब्द, फोटो के साथ), (6) विशेष ऑफर - नए यूजर्स के लिए पहली कंसल्टेशन पर छूट, मौजूदा यूजर्स के लिए रेफरल बोनस, (7) आपके प्रश्न - FAQ सेक्शन में 3 सामान्य प्रश्न-उत्तर, (8) स्वास्थ्य कैलेंडर - आगामी महीने के स्वास्थ्य दिवस (विश्व मधुमेह दिवस, हृदय दिवस), (9) सोशल मीडिया लिंक और संपर्क जानकारी। डिज़ाइन: मोबाइल-फ्रेंडली, 60-40 टेक्स्ट-इमेज रेशियो, ब्रांड कलर स्कीम। CTA: 'अभी कंसल्टेशन बुक करें' बटन।

Develop a comprehensive customer service crisis management plan for an Indian food delivery platform to handle major service disruptions (app crashes, mass delivery delays, food safety issues). Plan should include: (1) Crisis identification and classification: Level 1 (localized, under 1000 customers affected), Level 2 (regional, 1000-10000 affected), Level 3 (national, over 10000 or safety concern), (2) Crisis Response Team structure: Crisis Manager (Head of Customer Service), Tech Lead, Communications Lead, Operations Lead, Legal Advisor - define roles and responsibilities, (3) Immediate response protocol (first 30 minutes): confirm crisis, assess impact, activate response team, prepare initial statement, (4) Communication strategy: Internal - notify all support staff with talking points and FAQs, External - social media statement acknowledging issue, email/SMS to affected customers with apology and update, in-app banner with real-time status, (5) Resolution action plan: technical fixes for app issues, logistics workarounds for delivery delays, restaurant audits for food safety, (6) Customer compensation framework: Level 1 - refund only, Level 2 - refund + coupon, Level 3 - refund + future credits + possible additional compensation, (7) Support scaling: activate backup call center, extend chat support hours, deploy senior staff to handle volume, (8) Monitoring and updates: situation room with real-time dashboards, hourly updates to customers until resolved, (9) Post-crisis: root cause analysis, customer feedback analysis, process improvements, public reassurance campaign. Include crisis communication templates for each scenario.

भारतीय ट्रैवल एजेंसी के लिए IVR (Interactive Voice Response) मेन्यू का विस्तृत डिज़ाइन बनाएं। संरचना: (1) स्वागत संदेश (10 सेकंड) - 'आपका स्वागत है [कंपनी नाम] में। हम आपकी यात्रा को यादगार बनाने के लिए तत्पर हैं। कृपया अपनी भाषा चुनें: हिंदी के लिए 1 दबाएं, अंग्रेजी के लिए 2 दबाएं', (2) मुख्य मेन्यू - 'नई बुकिंग के लिए 1, मौजूदा बुकिंग से संबंधित के लिए 2, रद्दीकरण या बदलाव के लिए 3, शिकायत दर्ज करने के लिए 4, अन्य जानकारी के लिए 5 दबाएं या लाइन पर बने रहें', (3) सब-मेन्यू 1 (नई बुकिंग): फ्लाइट-1, होटल-2, हॉलिडे पैकेज-3, कार रेंटल-4, वापस जाने के लिए * दबाएं, (4) सब-मेन्यू 2 (मौजूदा): बुकिंग स्थिति जानने के लिए 1, टिकट में बदलाव के लिए 2, रसीद प्राप्त करने के लिए 3, (5) प्रत्येक विकल्प पर: तुरंत उपलब्ध जानकारी (जैसे बुकिंग नंबर डालने का निर्देश) या एजेंट से जुड़ने का विकल्प, (6) प्रतीक्षा समय का अनुमान - 'सभी एजेंट व्यस्त हैं, अनुमानित प्रतीक्षा समय 3 मिनट है', (7) कॉलबैक विकल्प - 'कॉलबैक के लिए अपना नंबर छोड़ें', (8) हर चरण पर: मुख्य मेन्यू पर वापस जाने का विकल्प। डिज़ाइन नोट्स: अधिकतम 2 स्तर की गहराई, प्रत्येक मेन्यू में 5 से अधिक विकल्प नहीं, स्पष्ट और धीमी आवाज़, प्रतीक्षा संगीत सुखद हो।

Draft a detailed Service Level Agreement (SLA) document between an Indian B2B software company and its enterprise clients for customer support services. Include: (1) Service Overview: Define types of support covered (technical issues, bug fixes, feature queries, training), support channels (phone, email, ticketing portal, on-site), business hours (9 AM - 6 PM IST Monday-Friday) and after-hours emergency support, (2) Support Tiers: Tier 1 - Basic (email only, 48-hour response), Tier 2 - Standard (email + ticket system, 24-hour response, 5 incident tickets/month), Tier 3 - Premium (all channels including phone, 4-hour response, unlimited tickets, dedicated account manager), (3) Response and Resolution Time Commitments organized by severity: Critical (system down, business stopped) - First Response: 1 hour, Resolution: 4 hours; High (major feature not working, significant impact) - First Response: 4 hours, Resolution: 24 hours; Medium (minor issue, workaround available) - First Response: 8 hours, Resolution: 3 business days; Low (general query, feature request) - First Response: 24 hours, Resolution: 7 business days, (4) Performance Metrics: Target uptime 99.5%, Average ticket resolution rate within SLA: 90%, Customer satisfaction score: above 4/5, (5) Client Responsibilities: provide detailed issue description, assign priority correctly, respond to support queries within 24 hours, maintain current software version, (6) Exclusions: issues from third-party integrations, custom code modifications, hardware failures, (7) Escalation Procedure: if response time exceeded, auto-escalate to manager; if resolution delayed, weekly status updates mandatory, (8) Penalties for Non-Compliance: if SLA breached - first time: warning, second time: 10% monthly fee credit, third time: 25% credit, (9) Review and Modification: SLA review quarterly, changes require 30-day notice. Format: legal contract style with numbered clauses, signature blocks.

एक भारतीय स्टार्टअप जो ग्राहक सेवा प्रबंधक पद के लिए साक्षात्कार आयोजित कर रहा है, के लिए 30 विस्तृत साक्षात्कार प्रश्न तैयार करें। श्रेणियां: (1) अनुभव और पृष्ठभूमि (5 प्रश्न) - 'अपने ग्राहक सेवा अनुभव के बारे में बताएं', 'आपकी सबसे बड़ी उपलब्धि क्या रही?', 'किस उद्योग में काम किया?', (2) समस्या समाधान (5 प्रश्न) - 'एक कठिन ग्राहक स्थिति का वर्णन करें जिसे आपने सुलझाया', 'जब आपके पास समाधान नहीं होता तो क्या करते हैं?', (3) तकनीकी ज्ञान (5 प्रश्न) - 'CRM सॉफ्टवेयर का अनुभव?', 'ग्राहक सेवा मेट्रिक्स की समझ?', 'चैटबॉट और AI टूल्स से परिचय?', (4) टीम प्रबंधन (5 प्रश्न) - 'टीम को कैसे प्रेरित करते हैं?', 'खराब प्रदर्शन करने वाले कर्मचारी को कैसे संभालते हैं?', 'प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम डिज़ाइन करने का अनुभव?', (5) ग्राहक-केंद्रित सोच (5 प्रश्न) - 'ग्राहक संतुष्टि बनाम कंपनी नीति में संघर्ष को कैसे संतुलित करते हैं?', 'ग्राहक प्रतिधारण रणनीतियां?', (6) स्थिति-आधारित (5 प्रश्न) - 'यदि सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल शिकायत हो तो क्या करेंगे?', 'त्योहारी सीजन में अचानक कॉल वॉल्यूम बढ़ जाए तो?'. प्रत्येक प्रश्न के लिए: आदर्श उत्तर में क्या देखें (2-3 बिंदु), रेड फ्लैग्स, फॉलो-अप प्रश्न का सुझाव। व्यवहारिक प्रश्न STAR फॉर्मेट (Situation-Task-Action-Result) में उत्तर की अपेक्षा करें।

Create a collection of 12 personalized thank you message templates for an Indian luxury hotel chain to send to guests after their stay. Vary templates based on guest segments: (1) First-time guest - Welcome them to the hotel family, express hope they enjoyed their maiden stay, mention one specific service they used (spa/restaurant), invite them back with a 10% discount code for next booking, (2) Returning guest - Acknowledge their loyalty (mention number of stays), thank for continued trust, personalized reference to something from current stay (room type, special occasion), exclusive loyalty program benefits reminder, (3) Special occasion (honeymoon/anniversary) - Congratulate the occasion, mention specific arrangements made (room decoration, cake), wish them happiness, offer to host future celebrations, (4) Business traveler - Appreciate choosing hotel for business needs, highlight business facilities used (conference room, business center), offer corporate rate card, fast check-in benefits for next stay, (5) Long-stay guest - Acknowledge extended stay, thank for making hotel their home, mention staff who served them, invite feedback for improvements, (6) Group/event booking - Thank for trusting with important event, highlight successful moments, offer to send event photos, discuss future group bookings. Each template should: be 100-150 words, include guest name placeholder, mention hotel name, have warm but professional tone, include specific stay dates, end with personal signature from General Manager, provide contact details, be available in English and Hindi versions, include branded email footer with social media links. Also create SMS versions (50 words) for immediate post-checkout thank you.

target: भारतीय ग्राहक सेवा केंद्रों के लिए ग्राहक डेटा सुरक्षा और गोपनीयता नीति दस्तावेज़ तैयार करें। शामिल करें: (1) डेटा संग्रह - कौन सी जानकारी एकत्र की जाती है (नाम, पता, फोन, ईमेल, खरीद इतिहास, भुगतान विवरण), क्यों एकत्र की जाती है (सेवा प्रदान करने, ऑर्डर प्रोसेस करने, संपर्क के लिए), कैसे एकत्र (ऑनलाइन फॉर्म, फोन कॉल, ऐप), (2) डेटा उपयोग - कैसे उपयोग होगा (ऑर्डर पूरा करना, ग्राहक सहायता, मार्केटिंग - लेकिन ऑप्ट-आउट विकल्प के साथ), तीसरे पक्ष के साथ साझा (केवल आवश्यक: पेमेंट गेटवे, लॉजिस्टिक्स पार्टनर), (3) डेटा सुरक्षा उपाय - तकनीकी: SSL एन्क्रिप्शन, फायरवॉल, नियमित बैकअप, टू-फैक्टर ऑथेंटिकेशन; भौतिक: सीमित एक्सेस, सुरक्षित सर्वर; संगठनात्मक: कर्मचारी प्रशिक्षण, NDA हस्ताक्षर, एक्सेस नियंत्रण, (4) ग्राहक अधिकार - अपना डेटा देखने का अधिकार, सुधार करने का अधिकार, हटाने का अधिकार (राइट टू बी फॉरगॉटन), डेटा पोर्टेबिलिटी, मार्केटिंग से ऑप्ट-आउट, (5) डेटा रखने की अवधि - सक्रिय ग्राहक: असीमित, निष्क्रिय: 5 साल, ट्रांजेक्शन रिकॉर्ड: 7 साल (कर कानून के अनुसार), (6) डेटा उल्लंघन प्रोटोकॉल - उल्लंघन की पहचान, तुरंत प्रभावित ग्राहकों को सूचित करना, अधिकारियों को रिपोर्ट, सुरक्षा उपाय मजबूत करना, (7) कुकीज़ और ट्रैकिंग - किस प्रकार की कुकीज़, क्यों उपयोग, कैसे डिसेबल करें, (8) बच्चों का डेटा - 18 से कम उम्र के डेटा एकत्र नहीं करना, (9) नीति में बदलाव - बदलावों की सूचना, कैसे संशोधित होगी। भारतीय IT Act 2000 और डिजिटल पर्सनल डेटा प्रोटेक्शन एक्ट के अनुपालन का उल्लेख। सरल भाषा में, कानूनी शब्दावली समझाते हुए।

Design a comprehensive customer onboarding guide for new users of an Indian digital payment wallet app. Structure as a 7-day welcome journey: Day 1 - Welcome email: introduce company mission, highlight key features (UPI, bill payments, money transfers, merchant payments, investments), link to video tutorial (2 minutes), prompt to complete profile, Day 2 - Getting Started guide: step-by-step instructions with screenshots for account setup (mobile verification, KYC upload, bank account linking, set PIN/passcode), security tips (never share OTP/PIN), Day 3 - First transaction tutorial: guide through making first UPI payment with ₹1 test transaction, explain transaction limits (daily/monthly), cashback offer on first 3 transactions, Day 4 - Feature exploration: introduce bill payment feature with list of supported billers, demo of adding beneficiaries for money transfer, explanation of QR code scanning for merchant payment, Day 5 - Safety and security module: enable biometric authentication, set transaction alerts, learn about dispute resolution process, fraud prevention tips, customer care contacts, Day 6 - Advanced features: investment options (mutual funds, gold), credit facilities (buy now pay later), loyalty rewards program explanation, referral bonus details, Day 7 - Engagement prompt: survey on onboarding experience, invite to join community (Telegram/WhatsApp group), exclusive new user benefits reminder, prompt to explore offers section. For each day: include interactive elements (checklist to complete, progress bar showing 'X of 7 days completed'), help resources (FAQs link, video tutorials, chat support option), motivational copy emphasizing benefits gained. Design: mobile-first approach, visual heavy with icons and illustrations, consistent branding, easy navigation with 'Next' button, option to skip or revisit any day. Languages: English, Hindi, and 8 regional languages. Success metrics to track: completion rate, time spent per day, feature adoption.

भारतीय ई-कॉमर्स कंपनी के लिए त्योहारी सीजन (दिवाली, अमेज़न ग्रेट इंडियन फेस्टिवल) के लिए ग्राहक सहायता योजना बनाएं। टाइमलाइन: (1) 3 महीने पहले की तैयारी - पिछले साल का डेटा विश्लेषण (कॉल/टिकट वॉल्यूम, पीक ऑवर्स, सामान्य समस्याएं), अनुमानित वृद्धि (150-200%), अतिरिक्त संसाधनों की पहचान (स्टाफिंग, तकनीक), बजट स्वीकृति, (2) 2 महीने पहले - भर्ती शुरू (अस्थायी कर्मचारी, 100-150 लोग), प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम तैयार (उत्पाद ज्ञान, सामान्य त्योहारी मुद्दे, रिफंड और डिलीवरी समय), परीक्षण सत्र, (3) 1 महीने पहले - टीम गठन (लीडर्स, रोटेशन शेड्यूल, बैकअप), टूल और सिस्टम अपडेट (Scaler Chatbot, CRM अपडेट), चैट/कॉल रूटिंग नियम अपडेट, FAQ और KB अपडेट, (4) सीजन के दौरान - लाइव डैशबोर्ड मॉनिटरिंग (कॉल वॉल्यूम, एवरेज वेट टाइम, फस्ट कॉल रिज़ॉल्यूशन), डेली स्टैंडअप मीटिंग, अतिरिक्त शिफ्ट रूटिंग (24x7 कॉल सेंटर), त्वरित निर्णय लेने वाला टीयर लीडर, (5) पोस्ट-सीजन - डेटा विश्लेषण, उपयोगकर्ता प्रतिक्रिया एकत्र करना, शिक्षा और अगले साल के लिए संशोधन। रिपोर्टिंग: फस्ट टच रिज़ॉल्यूशन रेट (80%+ लक्ष्य), AHT लक्ष्य (8-10 मिनट), CSAT लक्ष्य (75%+)

Prepare a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document for customer service in an Indian retail supermarket chain. Include sections: (1) Opening procedures: check registers, inventory systems, cleanliness, opening announcements; (2) Interaction protocol: greeting customers, eye contact, offering assistance, handling queues, maintaining product knowledge; (3) Transaction handling: correct billing, tax compliance, returns processing, loyalty program enrollment; (4) Cash handling and security protocols; (5) Handling complaints involving billing discrepancies or product defects; (6) Emergency procedures (health issues, theft, security threats); (7) Staff behavior and dress code; (8) Monthly training and performance review structure. Ensure SOP is written in clear, step-by-step language, with checklists and examples.

Create a daily standup meeting template for an Indian customer service operations team of 20+ agents. Structure: (1) Timing and duration (9:15–9:25 AM, 10 minutes), (2) Agenda: each agent speaks for 1–2 minutes maximum, focuses only on yesterday’s work, today’s priorities, and blockers, (3) Questions to answer: What did you do yesterday? (completed tickets, specific issues handled), What will you do today? (targets, follow-ups, complex tickets), Do you face any blockers? (system issues, policy confusion, escalations), (4) Shared metrics to review quickly at the end: total tickets, pending, CSAT, average handle time, (5) Guidelines: keep it solution‑oriented, limit discussion to blockers needing immediate help, refer other issues to separate channels. Format: Markdown agenda with placeholders for team name, date, facilitator, and notes.

एक भारतीय बीमा कंपनी के लिए शिकायत एस्केलेशन पर फोन स्क्रिप्ट लिखें, जहां क्लेम रिज़ॉल्यूशन में देर हो रही हो। स्क्रिप्ट में शामिल करें: (1) पहचान और स्वीकृति ('आपकी शिकायत लेवल टू पर एस्केलेट हो गई है'), (2) केस का संक्षिप्त विवरण ('क्लेम नंबर [XYZ], तारीख [dd/mm/yyyy], राशि [₹X]'), (3) क्या हो रहा था ('हम नियामक नियमों के अनुसार जांच चल रही थी'), (4) नया टाइमलाइन देना ('अब आपका क्लेम 3 कार्य दिवस में अंतिम निर्णय के लिए है'), (5) मुआवजा यदि लागू ('अतिरिक्त ₹X का समर्थन यदि देरी की वजह हमारी ओर से थी'), (6) निरंतर अपडेट का वादा ('हम आपको रोज़ स्थिति बताएंगे'), (7) संपर्क जानकारी दोहराना (नाम, ईमेल, फोन)। भाषा: हिंदी और अंग्रेजी दोनों संस्करण, स्वर: विनम्र, स्पष्ट और विश्वास जगाता हुआ।

Design a post‑purchase customer satisfaction survey for an Indian fashion e‑commerce brand. Ask 12 questions: (1) How did you hear about us? (multiple choice), (2) Ease of website/app navigation, (3) Product images and description accuracy, (4) Size and fit satisfaction, (5) Quality and value for money, (6) Delivery speed, (7) Packaging experience, (8) Customer service experience (if contacted), (9) Overall satisfaction (1–5 scale), (10) Likelihood to recommend (NPS), (11) Would you shop again? (yes/no), (12) Open comment for suggestions. Include: clear instructions, progress bar, estimated completion time (2–3 minutes), option to skip questions, privacy statement, incentive note (10% coupon for completing). Target: mobile‑friendly, single‑page form.

भारतीय बैंक की ऑनलाइन बैंकिंग ऐप के लिए ग्राहक से रेटिंग मांगने का इंटरैक्टिव टेक्स्ट और फ्लो डिज़ाइन करें। फ्लो: (1) ट्रिगर – ट्रांज़ैक्शन सफल होने पर या लॉगआउट के तुरंत बाद, (2) बैनर शीर्षक – 'कैसा रहा आपका अनुभव आज?', (3) रेटिंग स्केल – 5‑स्टार रेटिंग (स्टार्स), या 1–5 संख्याएं, (4) अतिरिक्त फीडबैक – 'क्षमा करें, आपका अनुभव क्यों कम रहा? (टिप्पणी लिखें)' यदि रेटिंग 3 से कम हो, (5) इनाम – 'रेटिंग देने पर ₹25 का इंस्टैंट कैशबैक या बैंक रॉयल्टी पॉइंट्स में,' (6) विकल्प – 'बाद में रेट करें' या 'हमें अभी छोड़ दें', (7) टेक्स्ट टोन – अधिकतम 2–3 वाक्य, दोस्ताना और आभारी। दोनों भाषा विकल्प: हिंदी और अंग्रेजी (बटन: 'हिंदी में देखें')।

Draft a professional email reply to a customer complaint about delayed internet broadband installation received by an Indian telecom provider. Structure: (1) Subject line mentioning tracking number and delay, (2) Opening line acknowledging the complaint and apologizing specifically for the delay, (3) Brief explanation of the reason (unplanned city‑wide maintenance, delay in technician availability), (4) Clear resolution timeline (new confirmed appointment window within 24–48 hours), (5) Compensation offered (1 day free internet usage, discount on next bill), (6) Commitment to improve service standards, (7) Direct contact details (phone, email, chat) and escalation path, (8) Thank you for patience. Tone: apologetic, transparent, solution‑oriented. Keep within 200 words.
